linting.notes: No golangci-lint configuration found. Linting is done via standard Go tools (fmt, vet) and govulncheck for vulnerability scanning. Semgrep config exists for security scanning but is not run in CI.

testing.test_directory: Multiple: api/v1alpha1, api/v1beta1, internal/controller, internal/migration, internal/utils
testing.run_single_file: Not applicable - Go tests require full package context
testing.run_single_test: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS="$(bin/setup-envtest use 1.34 --bin-dir bin -p path)" go test ./{package} -run {TestName}
env_vars: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS - set automatically by make test to envtest binaries path
testing.mock_patterns: Uses envtest for Kubernetes API mocking
testing.notes: Tests use envtest which downloads Kubernetes control plane binaries. The 'make test' target handles all setup including manifests generation, code generation, and envtest setup. Tests cannot be run file-by-file due to package dependencies.

advisory_checks.name: Build and test container image
advisory_checks.command: make docker-build && kind load docker-image && make deploy

ci.notes: The main gating workflow is build.yml which runs on pull_request. It requires Go 1.25.7. The uncommitted changes check ensures all generated code (manifests, deepcopy, conversion) is committed. The build-image-pr.yml workflow tests container image building and deployment to a Kind cluster but is integration-level testing.

build.notes: Build process includes: sync-images (update image refs), manifests generation (CRDs, RBAC), code generation (deepcopy, conversion), fmt, vet, then go build. The operator binary is output to bin/manager.

conventions.test_naming: Ginkgo BDD style: Describe/Context/It blocks. Suite files: *suite_test.go. TestXxx functions for Ginkgo suite entry points.
conventions.import_style: Absolute imports using github.com/opendatahub-io/model-registry-operator prefix. Grouped imports: stdlib, third-party, local packages.
conventions.notes: Uses kubebuilder project layout: api/ for CRDs, internal/controller for controllers, cmd/ for entrypoint. Code generation markers (//+kubebuilder:...) in Go files. Generated code marked with zz_generated.* prefix.

test_commands.notes: All tests passed. Coverage: 20-74% across packages. 61 specs in controller suite.

container_recipe.test_single_file: Not supported - use package-level: go test ./{package}
container_recipe.test_single_test: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS="$(bin/setup-envtest use 1.34 --bin-dir bin -p path)" go test ./{package} -run {TestName}
container_recipe.notes: The golang:1.25 image includes make and git by default. Tests download envtest binaries (etcd, kube-apiserver) on first run to bin/k8s/. The conversion-gen tool doesn't support --version flag which causes a harmless warning in make output. Build generates a ~90MB binary at bin/manager.

validation.summary: install OK, build OK (90MB binary), lint OK (fmt/vet/govulncheck all passed), tests OK (all 61 specs passed, coverage 20-74%)
